zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，关注关键支撑
zh.content:
ADA/USD目前维持窄幅震荡，价格运行在0.242附近，日内跌幅接近0.5%。由于价格低于20日均线，短线趋势略偏空，市场买盘动能不足，多头暂未形成有效反攻结构。

从技术指标观察，MACD仍处于零轴下方，空头动能虽不强，但显示市场情绪偏谨慎。均线压制明显，若无法重新站稳0.2427上方，后续仍可能延续弱势整理格局。

支撑方面，0.2408为当前第一支撑区域，若跌破可能进一步测试0.2380附近。上方阻力位关注0.2427及0.2450，只有放量突破后，行情才有机会打开新的反弹空间。

交易策略上，短线建议以区间交易思路为主，激进投资者可关注支撑附近低吸机会，但需严格控制仓位。若价格跌破关键支撑，应及时止损，避免弱势行情进一步扩大回撤风险。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
vs US Dollar (ADA/USD) is currently trading at 0.241559, reflecting a mild bearish drift within a tight consolidation range. Price action remains subdued after a slight 24h decline of -0.49%, indicating weak bullish follow-through. The market structure suggests indecision, with repeated failures to sustain levels above short-term moving averages, while volatility compresses near intraday lows. Bias remains slightly bearish in near term.

MACD reading at -0.00014146206 confirms weak bearish momentum, as the histogram remains below zero and recovery signals are absent. With RSI(14) unavailable, momentum confirmation relies heavily on price structure and moving averages. Trading below SMA(20) at 0.24269750 reinforces short-term resistance overhead and suggests limited upside strength unless reclaimed. Overall momentum remains fragile and range-bound. Short-term bias leans mildly negative pending breakout confirmation.

Support is established near 0.24079, marking the immediate downside floor where buyers recently defended price. Below this level, liquidity thins and the next potential support zone emerges around 0.238. On the upside, resistance is seen at SMA(20) near 0.24269750, followed by a stronger barrier around 0.243. Breaking above this zone would be required to shift short-term sentiment toward recovery. Otherwise, price action remains capped within a narrow trading band.

Trading conditions favor range strategies due to low volatility and compressed price action. Accumulation near support may offer short-term long opportunities with tight risk control. Stops should be placed below 0.240 to protect against breakdown risk. Targets are aligned near 0.2427 and 0.244 if momentum improves. Traders should wait for a confirmed breakout above resistance before positioning for sustained upside.
